name: MareScape
short_description: MareScape is a challenging 2D platformer that will make you question your sanity! Navigate through unforgiving obstacles, fight your muscle memory, and try not to succumb to raging frustration. Will you escape the nightmare?
detailed_description:
MareScape is a challenging 2D platformer that will make you question your sanity! Navigate through unforgiving obstacles, fight your muscle memory, and try not to succumb to raging frustration.

You find yourself wandering through a dark, moonlit forest when you arrive at a strange house. Do you dare enter? Who built this strange house? The only way out of this nightmare is to delve further inside...

Will you escape the nightmare?

KEY FEATURES

Unforgiving obstacles
- Navigate your way past 10 challenging obstacles to escape the nightmare. You will die hundreds of times!

Stylized 2D graphics
- MareScape offers a modern retrogames feel, with stylized 2D graphics.

Simple controls
- You control the character with A & D, or the left or right arrow keys, and spacebar. Pause the game with the Escape key.

Time and deaths tracking
- The game tracks your gameplay time and number of deaths. Challenge your friends to see who can beat the game with the fewest deaths!

Replayability
- Challenge yourself again to beat the game in the shortest time possible!

Steam Acheivements
- Unlock Steam Acheivements by beating each obstacle.
